summary: Preserved dotted producer names when parsing multi-model annotate TSV filenames.
Made repeated annotate finish reuse an unchanged current version and ref.
Accepted full-width annotation parentheses while protecting source-owned parenthesized text byte-for-byte.
Kept study.txt output and producer-priority selection unchanged per user decision.

validation.command: conda run -n llm python -m pytest tasks/translation/src -q
